sglang.title: [PD] Remove the requirement of config file for mooncake backend
sglang.author: ShangmingCai
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This PR completely removes the Mooncake backend's dependency on configuration files, allowing us to say goodbye to the tedious configuration preparation process. From now on, there's no need to prepend the MOONCAKE_CONFIG_PATH=./mooncake.json environment variable before commands as well.
Note: Need

The current code on main branch will throw variable referenced before assigned error if self.use_nan_detection evaluate to true. This PR fixes it.

vllm.title: [Frontend] Add sampling params to `v1/audio/transcriptions` endpoint
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Based on the work here #13910.
This PR adds the following sampling parameters to the transcriptions endpoint:
seed, topk, topp, minp, frequency_penalty, repetition_penalty, presence_penalty.
cc @joennlae

vllm.title: [Misc] Benchmarks for audio models
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Implements feature requested in #16354.
Test with:
# server
vllm serve openai/whisper-large-v3-turbo

# client
python3 benchmarks/benchmark_serving.py \       
    --backend openai-audio \
    --dataset-name hf \
    --dataset-path edinburghcstr/ami --hf-subset ihm \
    --model openai/whisper-large

vllm.title: Log how much time loading a compiled artifact takes
vllm.author: zou3519
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When people say they don't like the "torch.compile startup time", they mean two things:

the cold start time
the warm start time (when the vLLM disk cache has already been
populated).

We had logging for (1), we didn't have (2). This PR adds (2)
Test Plan:
I ran VLLM_USE_V1=1 python benchmark_latenc

vllm.title: [easy] Pass compile_fx only the config patches
vllm.author: zou3519
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Previously we were passing compile_fx the entire default inductor config with the patches applied to it.
compile_fx only needs to be passed the patches (reference: https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch/blob/29317f8585ecb232412df3f39734490f0f6d8230/torch/_inductor/compile_fx.py#L1873-L1880)
This PR chan
